description: You are a medical assistant at Hillside Family Medicine completing intake for a new patient, Hobert Wuckert (DOB: October 27, 2000). Log in as demo_provider (password: Provider1234!). This patient has never been seen at the practice. Document the patient's social history (former smoker who quit in 2015, social alcohol use at 2-3 drinks per week, and no illicit drug use), family history (Father: Type 2 Diabetes mellitus, deceased at age 72 from cardiac event; Mother: Hypertension, currently living), and primary insurance (Medicare, Member ID: 1EG4-TE5-MK72, Group Number: A1234). Create an initial consultation encounter

metadata.occupation_context: Medical Assistant — new patient intake workflow
required_actions: Add social history (former smoker quit 2015, social alcohol 2-3/week, no illicit drugs)
Add family history (Father: T2DM deceased age 72 cardiac; Mother: hypertension living)
Add Medicare insurance (Member ID: 1EG4-TE5-MK72, Group: A1234)

expected_db_state.other_history: 2+ rows for pid=11 (social and family history entries)
